title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Chandigarh location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates:
Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates!
